/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -Wall -Wextra -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/log_analysis_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/log_analysis_test.dir/test_log_analysis.cpp.o -o log_analysis_test   -L/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite/lib  -L/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite/lib:/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib -lpthread
